headline: Coinbase Cuts 14% of Workforce in ‘AI-Native’ Pivot. The Stock Jumps.
summary: Coinbase Global  plans to slash 700 jobs, or 14% of its workforce, as the cryptocurrency exchange operator aims to cut costs and streamline its operations.  Artificial intelligence is partially to blame.  CEO Brian Armstrong said in a letter to employees that  Coinbase  remains “well-capitalized” and “well-positioned to weather any storm.”

content.title: Coinbase Cuts 14% of Workforce in ‘AI-Native’ Pivot. The Stock Jumps.
content.summary: Coinbase Global  plans to slash 700 jobs, or 14% of its workforce, as the cryptocurrency exchange operator aims to cut costs and streamline its operations.  Artificial intelligence is partially to blame.  CEO Brian Armstrong said in a letter to employees that  Coinbase  remains “well-capitalized” and “well-positioned to weather any storm.”

headline: S&P 500 Rises on Big Tech Bump, Corporate Profits and Oil Price Relief
summary: The S&P 500 (^GSPC) heads into Tuesday with momentum after a powerful rebound last month in which the broader markets advanced 9%. A pullback in crude oil and first-quarter earnings beats are driving today’s gains as the markets embrace a reprieve in the Mideast escalation. The S&P 500 (^GSPC) is capturing those tailwinds for gains ... S&P 500 Rises on Big Tech Bump, Corporate Profits and Oil Price Relief

headline: Market Minute 5-5-26- Palantir Profits, Coinbase Cuts, Yields in Focus
summary: After a moderate pullback on war worries yesterday, stocks are rising today. Gold and silver are rebounding as well, while crude oil is giving up ground. The dollar is flat, while Treasury yields continue to flirt with key levels.

content.title: Market Minute 5-5-26- Palantir Profits, Coinbase Cuts, Yields in Focus
